case_title: REID, BEVERLY M. vs. JOHNSON, DANN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REID, BEVERLY M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3446 JENNINGS ST, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522 JUDGEMENT INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER C.C.P. 415.46.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DANN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $26.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF REID, BEVERLY M.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $164.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE OCT-31-1996, FILED BY PLAINTIFF REID, BEVERLY M.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REID, BEVERLY M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 7/10/96 $4,266.70 RENT, $775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,246.70, LEASE FORFEITED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REID, BEVERLY M. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DANN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
